# Web3 Devs Underground

> Israel's largest developer-led Web3 community — meetups, talks, and 3,200+ builders. Connect. Learn. Build.

Web3 Devs Underground (web3devs.org) is a community for blockchain and decentralized-technology developers and builders in Israel. Founded in 2020 by Roy Osherove and Shauli Rejwan, it runs regular in-person meetups and conference talks featuring speakers from leading Web3 companies (e.g. StarkWare, Chainlink, Stellar, Mina, Aztec, Check Point and more). The community has 3,200+ members.

## Pages
- [Home](https://web3devs.org/): events, featured speakers, team, and how to join the community.
- [Careers](https://web3devs.org/careers): Web3 & blockchain job openings shared by companies in the community, plus a talent pool where developers can submit their profile.

## Key links
- Events calendar (Luma): https://luma.com/web3devs_underground
- Meetup group: https://www.meetup.com/israel-web3-developer-underground/
- Telegram community: https://t.me/+-sEflgfrqDoyYWVk
- YouTube (recorded talks): https://www.youtube.com/@web3devsunderground
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/israel-web3-developer-underground/
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/Web3_Devs
- Contact: web3devsunderground@gmail.com

## Facts
- Name: Web3 Devs Underground (a.k.a. Israel Web3 Developers Underground)
- Founded: 2020
- Founders: Roy Osherove, Shauli Rejwan
- Location / area served: Israel
- Focus: blockchain, web3, decentralized technology — developer meetups, talks, hiring
- Tagline: Connect. Learn. Build.
